context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Bottom area of cage where poop accumulates, cleaning interaction zone
context.screen_position: Bottom section from y=110 to y=128, full width 128px
context.usage_scenario: Area where poop items appear, player swipes to clean

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangle at bottom of screen
visual_specification.texture: Flat color with optional subtle texture (1-2px variation)
visual_specification.outline: 1px top edge (#AB5236) to separate from main cage area

animation.description: Static floor, no animation (cleaning effects handled separately)

visual_specification.details: Light peachy-brown color (#FFCCAA) filling bottom 18px of screen, 1px darker brown line (#AB5236) at y=110 to define top edge, provides contrast area for poop visibility

relationships.shared_with: All environment elements share background layer

explicit_negations: No animated cleaning (handled by particle effects)
No color changes when dirty (poop items show state)
